items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主要驱动因素：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四个监控指标：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX指数（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金更易回撤；VIX指数上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且V
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Maire shares rise 6% after Kepler Cheuvreux upgrade, citing Iran selloff…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Mortgage demand drops more than 10% as rates hit the highest level since…

items.title: Cipher数字（Cipher）股价大涨，原因是公司与新租赁数据中心的协议。
items.title_en: Cipher Digital stock surges after new data center lease deal

items.title: OpenAI的Sora视频生成器被取消，告诉我们AI的什么
items.summary: 分析师称，任何人都能发展出规模化的社交、视频、音乐或市场业务的想法被夸大了。
items.title_en: What OpenAI scrapping its Sora video generator tells us about AI
items.summary_en: The idea that anyone can develop a scaled social, video, music or marketplace business has been exaggerated, one analyst says.

items.title: Arm跳涨13%，在预市交易中说，首个内部芯片集将产生15亿美元收入
items.summary: Arm表示，预计其新芯片将在2031年产生的收入比2025年4亿美元高六倍。
items.title_en: Arm jumps 13% in premarket after saying first in-house chip set to generate $15 billion in revenue
items.summary_en: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025.

items.title: Meta在股权期权上下了“大赌注”，以应对人工智能领域的压力。
items.summary: Meta正在为高管授予股票期权，随着公司在人工智能战役中的压力加剧。
items.title_en: Meta makes 'big bet' on top leaders with stock options as pressure builds to catch up in AI
items.summary_en: Meta is granting stock options to top executives as pressure on the company intensifies in the AI battle.

items.title: Arm 股价上涨6%，首席执行官哈斯预计新芯片将带来15亿美元的收入
items.summary: Arm推出了其首款内部芯片，于周二在旧金山举行了发布活动，Meta是首批客户。
items.title_en: Arm stock pops 6% as CEO Haas issues $15 billion revenue expectation for new chip
items.summary_en: Arm unveiled its first in-house chip on Tuesday at an event in San Francisco, with Meta as the initial customer.

items.title: Meta因违反新墨西哥州法律而必须支付3750万美元的赔偿，陪审团做出裁决
items.summary: 新墨西哥州案件的陪审团做出裁决，州检察长指控Meta未能保护其应用家族免受儿童猎手的侵害。
items.title_en: Meta must pay $375 million for violating New Mexico law in child exploitation case, jury rules
items.summary_en: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

items.title: 7家软件股料面对AI不确定性而蓬勃发展
items.summary: 微软是威廉布莱尔分析师杰森·阿德尔（Jason Ader）称之为人工智能时代可能获胜的软件公司之一。
items.title_en: 7 software stocks set to thrive in the face of AI uncertainty
items.summary_en: Microsoft is one software company that William Blair analyst Jason Ader has called out as a likely winner in the age of artificial intelligence.

items.title: OpenAI 增发资金，总融资额达到 1200亿美元，CFO 告诉克雷默。
items.summary: 新融资使OpenAI的历史融资总额达到1,200亿美元，超过了ChatGPT创造者的初始目标100亿美元。
items.title_en: OpenAI raises additional money to bring record funding round to $120 billion, CFO tells Cramer
items.summary_en: The fresh capital brings OpenAI's historic fundraise to $120 billion, exceeding the ChatGPT creator's initial target of $100 billion.

items.title: 亚马逊收购人机交互机器人制造商Fauna Robotics
items.summary: Fauna的第一款产品，名为Sprout，是一款售价50,000美元的三脚走路机器人，身高3英尺6英寸，设计为“亲和性强且人性化”。
items.title_en: Amazon acquires 'approachable' humanoid maker Fauna Robotics
items.summary_en: Fauna's first product, called Sprout, is a $50,000 bipedal robot that's 3 feet, 6 inches tall and designed to be "approachable and human-friendly."

items.title: OpenAI关闭短视频应用Sora，公司在控制成本方面取得进展
items.summary: OpenAI宣布关闭短视频应用Sora，Sora在上个月初上线后迅速走红
items.title_en: OpenAI shutters short-form video app Sora as company reels in costs
items.summary_en: OpenAI said it's closing Sora, the short-form video app that went viral after its launch six months ago

items.title: 贾马尔·迪蒙警告称人工智能将导致大量失业，呼吁政府和企业联合提供激励措施。
items.summary: 华盛顿的立法者正在努力应对人工智能可能对就业市场造成的冲击。
items.title_en: Dimon warns on AI job losses, calls for government-business incentives
items.summary_en: The potential AI-related disruption of the job market is a critical issue in Washington, with lawmakers trying to curb the amount of displacement.

items.title: 谷歌与Agile Robots合作，扩大其人工智能机器人足迹
items.summary: 谷歌的DeepMind部门近几个月来与更多的机器人公司合作。
items.title_en: Google partners with Agile Robots, growing its AI robotics footprint
items.summary_en: Google's DeepMind division has been partnering with more robotics companies in recent months.

items.title: OpenAI重新设计了ChatGPT的购物体验，解决了Instant Checkout功能的使用困难问题。
items.summary: OpenAI表示，新体验将使用户更容易找到并比较产品。
items.title_en: OpenAI revamps shopping experience in ChatGPT after struggling with Instant Checkout offering
items.summary_en: OpenAI said the new experience will make it easier for users to find and compare products.

items.title: Arm发布首款自主芯片，Meta成为首个客户
items.summary: Arm 正在开发自己的中央处理器（CPU），从仅向苹果、NVIDIA、亚马逊和谷歌等巨头许可其架构转变。CNBC独家首次看到了它。
items.title_en: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
items.summary_en: Arm is making its first CPU, pivoting from only licensing its architecture to giants like Apple, Nvidia, Amazon and Google. CNBC got an exclusive first look.

items.title: Anthropic称Claude现在可以使用您的电脑来完成任务以推动人工智能代理
items.summary: Anthropic及其竞争对手正试图提高AI代理的能力，之前今年的OpenClaw事件引发了广泛关注。
items.title_en: Anthropic says Claude can now use your computer to finish tasks for you in AI agent push
items.summary_en: Anthropic and its rivals are trying to ramp up capabilities of AI agents after OpenClaw went viral earlier this year.

items.title: Gap表示将在谷歌的Gemini中推出自助结算功能，这是时尚行业一家主要公司首次采用人工智能技术。
items.summary: 在专营零售领域竞争日益激烈的情况下，Gap与Gemini的合作以及其面向客户的AI工具为其带来了竞争优势。
items.title_en: Gap says it will launch checkout within Google's Gemini, in an AI first from a major fashion company
items.summary_en: Gap's partnership with Gemini and its customer-facing AI tools give it a competitive edge at a time when winning in specialty retail is harder than ever.

items.title: 亚马逊的Zoox计划今年晚些时候在奥斯汀和迈阿密推出无人出租车。
items.summary: 这是亚马逊自主驾驶单位Zoox的最新扩张，去年该单位在拉斯维加斯和旧金山的一些地区向公众开放了乘坐服务。
items.title_en: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year as it awaits paid ride approval
items.summary_en: It marks the latest expansion for Amazon's Zoox self-driving unit, which opened rides to the public in some parts of Las Vegas and San Francisco last year.

items.title: 阿里巴巴公布新一代专为"代理"设计的AI芯片
items.summary: 虽然人们对GPU的关注度很高，NVIDIA在此领域占据了主导地位，但CPU被认为是关键的AI推理和代理人。
items.title_en: Alibaba reveals new AI chip designed for 'agents'
items.summary_en: While much of the attention has focused on GPUs, an area Nvidia dominates, CPUs are seen as key for AI inferencing and agents.

items.title: 房贷需求下降超过10%，当月利率达到10月份以来最高水平。
items.summary: 房屋贷款需求继续下滑，随着房屋贷款利率大幅上涨和房价相对收入的进一步下降。
items.title_en: Mortgage demand drops more than 10% as rates hit the highest level since October
items.summary_en: Mortgage demand continued to tumble last week, as mortgage rates surged higher and affordability weakened further.

items.title: Citrini关于人工智能做出了著名的预测。新的一注是，市场对美联储的判断是错误的。
items.summary: 该公司建议在2027年3月的利率期货上买入，同时在美国股票上空头。
items.title_en: Citrini made a famous call about AI. The new bet is that the market is wrong on the Fed.
items.summary_en: Firm recommends buying March 2027 rate futures while shorting U.S. stocks

items.title: 不要被英国战前通胀数据所迷惑——一场“残酷”的通胀大爆发可能正在酝酿中。
items.summary: 英国统计局（ONS）最新数据显示，英国2月通胀率保持在3%不变。
items.title_en: Don't be fooled by the UK's pre-war inflation print — a 'brutal' surge could be coming
items.summary_en: The U.K. inflation rate stood firm at 3% in February, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).

items.title: 环球环球 (Circle) 的稳定币收益可能受影响，公司股价下跌。
items.summary: 稳定币如Circle的USDC等的收益率，通常以奖励的形式呈现，是用户持有这些币的关键动力。
items.title_en: Circle posts worst day on record as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield
items.summary_en: Earning yield, usually in the form of rewards, on stablecoins like Circle's USDC and others is key incentive for users to hold the coins.

items.title: 马伊尔股份（Maire）股价上涨6%，凭借Kepler Cheuvreux的升级评级，称伊朗出售过度。
items.title_en: Maire shares rise 6% after Kepler Cheuvreux upgrade, citing Iran selloff overdone

items.title: 黄金大涨2% 因油价下跌缓解了因特朗普与伊朗谈判而引发的通胀恐惧。
items.summary: 黄金价格上涨，因为油价下跌有助于缓解人们对持续通胀的担忧，随着华盛顿方面正在就结束中东冲突的提议进行磋商。
items.title_en: Gold jumps 2% as oil slump eases inflation fears amid Trump Iran talks
items.summary_en: Gold climbed as declining oil prices helped temper worries over persistent inflation following reports that Washington is working on a proposal to bring an end to the Middle East conflict.

items.title: 韩国为应对“最坏情景”而备战，伊朗石油冲击加深
items.summary: 韩国总理金敏求警告称，政府必须为中东冲突可能造成的"最坏情况"做好准备。
items.title_en: South Korea braces for 'worst-case scenarios' as Iran oil shock deepens
items.summary_en: South Korean Prime Minister Kim Min-seok warned the government must prepare for "worst-case scenarios" stemming from the Middle East conflict.

items.title: 石油价格下跌，伊朗表示允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的“非敌对”船只安全通行
items.summary: 石油价格下跌，因为唐纳德·特朗普表示华盛顿和德黑兰“目前正在进行谈判”，并表明伊朗愿意达成和平协议。
items.title_en: Oil prices fall as Iran signals safe passage for ‘non-hostile’ ships through Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_en: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump that Washington and Tehran are "in negotiations right now" and indicated Iran is keen to reach a peace agreement.

items.title: 亚洲的乌克兰时刻：伊朗战争如何加速转向可再生能源
items.summary: 中东冲突的影响预计将成为能源转型的分水岭。
items.title_en: ‘Asia’s Ukraine moment’: How the Iran war could accelerate a shift into renewables
items.summary_en: The fallout from the sprawling Middle East conflict is expected to represent a watershed moment for the energy transition.

items.title: 美国国债收益率大幅下跌，特朗普称赞伊朗停火计划
items.summary: 美国国债收益率周三下跌，受中东潜在和平计划的影响。
items.title_en: Treasury yields tumble as Trump talks up Iran ceasefire plan
items.summary_en: U.S. Treasury yields ticked lower on Wednesday amid hopes of a potential peace plan in the Middle East.

items.title: 石油价格因美国与伊朗达成停火协议的报告而下跌。
items.summary: 布伦特原油因美国停火提议而下跌5%。
items.title_en: Oil prices fall on reports of a U.S. ceasefire proposal with Iran
items.summary_en: Brent crude traded 5% lower on reports of U.S. ceasefire proposal.

items.title: 霍尔木兹海峡封锁不仅影响石油和天然气，还影响另一种关键商品。
items.summary: 一位基金经理告诉CNBC：“我对当前的危机比四年前俄乌冲突时更为担忧。”
items.title_en: It’s not just oil and gas. The Strait of Hormuz blockage is rattling another vital commodity
items.summary_en: “I'm a lot more concerned about the current crisis than I was when Russia-Ukraine happened four years ago,” one fund manager told CNBC.

items.title: 亚太股市上涨，特朗普的评论表明伊朗冲突的缓和
items.summary: 特朗普表示，他决定放弃最近威胁要对伊朗能源基础设施发动袭击的计划，“基于我们正在谈判的事实”。
items.title_en: Asia-Pacific stocks rise as Trump comments signal de-escalation in Iran conflict
items.summary_en: Trump said he decided to back off from his recent threat to order strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure "based on the fact we're negotiating."

items.title: 伊朗领导人莫吉塔巴·卡梅尼（Mojtaba Khamenei）获得了X平台的蓝标志——然后它消失了
items.summary: 伊朗新最高领袖穆罕默德·哈梅内伊的英文账号在他失去蓝勾之前成功订阅了X Premium。
items.title_en: Sanctioned Iran leader Mojtaba Khamenei gets another blue checkmark on X — then it disappears
items.summary_en: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, managed to subscribe to X Premium on his English-language account before his blue check was eventually removed.

items.title: 英国CNBC的《英国交易》通讯：为什么英国债券承受了伊朗大幅抛售的冲击
items.summary: 英国政府的借贷成本上升，对其实现财政目标的能力构成严重威胁，尤其是冲突持续的情况下。
items.title_en: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Why UK bonds bore the brunt of the Iran sell-off
items.summary_en: The rise in borrowing costs has grave implications for the UK government's ability to hit its fiscal targets should the conflict remain protracted.

items.title: 石油价格下跌，股指期货上涨，据报道美国已向伊朗提议停火
items.summary: 全球石油价格暴跌，美国股市期货价格上涨。据报道，美国通过中间人巴基斯坦向伊朗传递了结束中东冲突的15点计划，这场冲突已经持续了四周。
items.title_en: Oil prices fall, stock futures climb on reports U.S. has proposed a cease-fire to Iran
items.summary_en: Global oil prices tumbled and U.S. stock futures rose on Tuesday evening following reports that the U.S., via intermediary Pakistan, had sent Iran a 15-point plan to end the conflict in the Middle East, now in its fourth week.

items.title: 美伊谈判仍笼罩在不确定之中
items.summary: 全球市场寻找方向，受美以伊冲突信号混乱的影响。
items.title_en: CNBC Daily Open: U.S.-Iran talks remain clouded in uncertainty
items.summary_en: Global markets search for direction amid mixed signals on U.S.-Israel and Iran conflict.

items.title: 委内瑞拉反对派领导人玛丽亚·科里纳·马查多呼吁全面私有化石油行业
items.summary: 马查多的言论出现在石油行业仍然犹豫不决地在委内瑞拉投资的背景下，尤其是在美国将前总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗（Nicolas Maduro）驱逐出境之后。
items.title_en: Venezuela opposition leader María Corina Machado calls for full privatization of oil industry
items.summary_en: Machado's remarks come as the oil industry remains hesitant to invest in Venezuela after the U.S. ousted former President Nicolas Maduro.

items.title: 美国向伊朗提交了结束战争的15点计划，报道称；特朗普称“目前正在进行谈判”。
items.summary: 白宫新闻秘书卡罗琳·利维特表示，行动“Epic Fury”仍在继续，以实现唐纳德·特朗普总统的军事目标。
items.title_en: U.S. sent Iran 15-point plan to end war, report says; Trump says 'in negotiations right now'
items.summary_en: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

items.title: 科威特称霍尔木兹海峡关闭将是灾难性的，会引发全球经济的连锁反应。
items.summary: 伊朗正在通过封锁霍尔木兹海峡来挟持世界经济，库达尔石油公司CEO谢赫纳瓦夫·阿尔·萨巴赫说。
items.title_en: Kuwait says Strait of Hormuz closure is beyond catastrophic, will trigger domino effect across global economy
items.summary_en: Iran is holding the world economy hostage by blockading the Strait of Hormuz, said Sheikh Nawaf al-Sabah, the CEO of Kuwait Petroleum Corp.

items.title: 巴基斯坦表示愿意促进美国和伊朗的战争谈判，特朗普和德黑兰给出了矛盾的信号。
items.summary: 特朗普称，美国和伊朗的谈判代表进行了“非常强烈”的谈判，但伊朗方面否认了这一说法。
items.title_en: Pakistan offers to facilitate U.S.-Iran war talks as Trump and Tehran give mixed signals
items.summary_en: Trump said top U.S. negotiators and their Iranian counterparts have been engaged in "very, very strong talks," but Tehran has denied that claim.

items.title: 贾米·迪蒙表示伊朗战争在长期内会使中东和平前景更好
items.summary: 贾米·迪蒙（Jamie Dimon）表示了对中东和平的乐观态度，伊朗与中东的战争已经持续数周。
items.title_en: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
items.summary_en: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

items.title_en: Nanobiotix stock jumps on takeover report involving J&J

items.title: Delta航空公司的炼油押注看起来在喷气燃油紧张中更有价值。
items.title_en: Delta Air Lines’ refinery bet looks more valuable in jet fuel squeeze

items.title: Codere考虑出售价值约23亿美元的资产，Expansion称
items.title_en: Codere mulls potential $2.3 billion sale, Expansion says

items.title_en: On Holding stock falls 5% as CEO Martin Hoffmann steps down

items.title_en: Pakistan has conveyed US proposal; Turkey or Pakistan could host talks, senior Iranian official says

items.title: 默克公司将以 67 亿美元的交易价格收购肿瘤药物公司 Terns Pharmaceuticals。
items.title_en: Merck to buy oncology firm Terns Pharmaceuticals in $6.7 billion deal

items.title: 默克计划以 67 亿美元收购 Terns Pharmaceuticals 以增强癌症治疗药物开发
items.summary: 默克正试图在其最畅销的肿瘤药物Keytruda在2028年失去专利保护之前扩充其产品组合。
items.title_en: Merck to buy Terns Pharmaceuticals for $6.7 billion to boost cancer pipeline
items.summary_en: Merck is trying to bulk up its portfolio ahead of its best-selling cancer drug Keytruda losing patent protection in 2028.

items.title: 阿拉伯联合酋长国（UAE）在全球建立了一个盛大的活动帝国，但战争却使其陷入停滞。
items.summary: 战争爆发使航班停飞，威胁到该地区精心打造的未来，文化到加密的事件都悄悄地被推迟。
items.title_en: The Gulf built a global events empire, now war is putting it on ice
items.summary_en: As war grounds flights and threatens to destabilize the region's carefully built future, events from cultural to crypto have been quietly rescheduled.

items.title: 参议员华伦：国防部回应显示没有针对特朗普子女的反腐败协议
items.summary: 民主党人一直对特朗普家族在白宫任职期间的商业交易表示强烈批评。
items.title_en: Sen. Warren: DOD answers show no anti-corruption protocols for Trump children
items.summary_en: Democrats have been hotly critical of the Trump family's business dealings while President Donald Trump serves in the White House.

items.title: 我30岁，忘记一年给爸爸付手机账单，他让我还975美元，觉得合理吗？
items.summary: 父母突然变成一位$1,000债务催收员，感觉很奇怪。
items.title_en: I’m 30 and forgot to pay my dad for my cellphone bill for a year. He charged me $975. Is that fair?
items.summary_en: “Something about a parent suddenly acting like a $1,000 debt collector feels weird.”

items.title: 丹麦总理弗雷德里克森因对抗特朗普而遭遇选举失利
items.summary: 弗雷德里克森试图利用民众的支持，尤其是在他对特朗普的挪威绿兰（丹麦自治领土）扩张计划的反对立场。
items.title_en: Denmark’s PM Frederiksen suffers election setback after standing up to Trump over Greenland
items.summary_en: Frederiksen had sought to capitalize on popular support after standing up to Trump's push to annex Greenland, a self-governing Danish territory.

items.title: 伊朗战争可能导致美元黄金时代的终结
items.summary: 德国银行分析师说：“一个能够自给自足的防御和能源世界，也可能是一个持有美元储备较少的世界。”
items.title_en: How the Iranian war may lead to the last days of the petrodollar
items.summary_en: “A world that becomes self-sufficient in defense and energy could also be a world that holds less dollar reserves,” says a Deutsche Bank analyst.

items.title: 华尔街认为经济出现裂缝，衰退风险上升
items.summary: 经济学家因地缘政治风险和劳动力市场萎缩而提高了对收缩的风险评估。
items.title_en: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
items.summary_en: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.

items.title: 私人信贷的“零损失幻想”正在走到尽头，违约和基金退出率上升
items.summary: 私人信贷市场料将出现大量违约事件，因为投资者继续从该领域撤资。
items.title_en: Private credit’s ‘zero-loss fantasy’ is coming to an end as defaults and fund exits rise
items.summary_en: Private credit is expected to see a surge in defaults as investors continue to pull money from the sector.

items.title: 黑石集团首席执行官拉里·菲克(Larry Fink)表示，他不会让私人信贷投资者提前赎回资金：“这些是规则，接受它。”
items.summary: 黑石集团主席兼首席执行官拉里·芬克对私人信贷投资者发出严厉的警告：那些想退出基金的投资者将面临严厉的处罚。
items.title_en: BlackRock’s Fink on why he won’t cash out private-credit investors: ‘Those are the rules, live with it.’
items.summary_en: BlackRock Chairman and CEO Larry Fink has an unforgiving message to private-credit investors who want to exit their funds.

items.title: 我用Paypal账户收到了来自菲律宾的钱，附带了两个电话号码。后来我打了电话，真是个大错误。
items.summary: “我知道我的信息已经泄露到暗网上，我已经采取了谨慎的措施。”
items.title_en: My Paypal account received money from the Philippines with two phone numbers listed. I called them. Big mistake.
items.summary_en: “I know my information is on the dark web, and I have taken steps to be cautious.”
